caption: The video features an older man with gray hair, wearing a dark sweater over a light-colored shirt. He is standing indoors against a plain white wall, with a stack of blue and white books visible on a surface to his right. The man appears to be engaged in a conversation or delivering a speech, as he is seen speaking and gesturing slightly with his head and mouth movements. The setting seems casual and possibly part of an interview or a personal vlog, given the informal attire and the simple background. The logo "Tiger-TV" in the top right corner suggests that this content might be part of a television program or web series.
